[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111010111 8
1 1110101111 8
2 1011111111 9
3 0011111111 8
4 1111010111 8
5 1110101111 8
6 1011111111 9
7 0011111111 8

01 10 1111101111 9
12 21 1110001111 7
23 32 0111001111 7
34 43 0011111111 8 match 3 7

56 65 1011111101 8
67 76 1010111100 6
70 07 1001111100 6

13 31 1111001111 8
24 42 0111111111 9
35 53 1011011111 8
46 64 1011111111 9 match 2 6
57 75 1011110101 7
60 06 1011101000 5
71 17 1110110111 8

03 30 0011101111 7
14 41 1111111111 a
25 52 1111011111 9
36 63 1011101111 8
47 74 1011111111 9 match 2 6
50 05 1011111101 8
61 16 1110101111 8 match 1 5
72 27 1110111111 9

04 40 0011111111 8 match 3 7
15 51 1111010111 8 match 0 4
26 62 1110101111 8 match 1 5
37 73 1011111111 9 match 2 6
[completion]
0 15 51
1 61 16 26 62
2 45 54 46 64 47 74 37 73
3 34 43 04 40

15 26 37 40 51 62 73 04
